changelog: v1.5.24: Fix 5-minute CI hang -- GPUtil.getGPUs() now has 5s timeout.
changes: FIX: GPUtil.getGPUs() now wrapped in _get_gpus(timeout=5) -- prevents 5-min CI hang on Linux runners with nvidia-smi but no real GPU
FIX: Affects startup (_get_sysinfo), background poll (_read_gpu), and /api/diagnostics endpoint
FIX: Live URL checks already skipped in CI (v1.5.23)
FIX: Installer targets %LOCALAPPDATA% -- no admin rights needed (v1.5.21)
